## Source: ghsa-malware (5c6d035ca973c4ae02ef783982a9a9630e75f0f3a9e41440bcceef05145e869b)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (1aea1a60f074d92d58e8e1644f08af16097bc4fc496a7acc2b60f586ce504017)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'microsoft_kiota_http' @ 6.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
